display.purpose: Hero heading only. One per page. text-wrap: balance.

label.purpose: Code blocks, terminal output, metadata, badges. Geist Mono.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Default easing for scroll-reveal animations. Exponential ease-out.

motion.name: fade-blur
motion.purpose: Section entrance: starts readable (blurred), resolves to clarity.

motion.name: stagger-delay
motion.purpose: Staggered child entrance delays within a section.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Call-to-action. Stoplight Red pill button. Used for Get Started, Submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.6 0.2 25); color: #fff; height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined pill button. Used for GitHub link, secondary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.98 0.002 20); height: 48px; padding: 0 32px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.1 0.01 20); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Pillar feature card with colored top bar accent, code snippet.
components.html:
Factuality

Are claims accurate and faithful to expected output?

hallucination_rate: 0.03
components.css: .ds-card-feature { background: oklch(0.1 0.01 20); border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-bar { height: 4px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.98 0.002 20); margin: 0; } .ds-card-text { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.6 0.015 20); margin: 0; } .ds-card-code { background: oklch(0.08 0.006 20); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); padding: 12px; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-card-code pre { font-family: Geist Mono, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.6 0.015 20); margin: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; }

components.name: Terminal Window
components.description: Terminal mockup with traffic-light dots, used for CLI demonstration.
components.html:
regtrace run

i Evaluating (5 test cases)

✓ cs-001: 100%

Suite Score: 73.3%
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: oklch(0.08 0.006 20); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); overflow: hidden; font-family: Geist Mono, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; } .ds-terminal-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 16px; background: oklch(0.06 0.008 20); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); } .ds-terminal-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-terminal-label { margin-left: 8px; color: oklch(0.6 0.015 20); } .ds-terminal-body { padding: 12px 16px; } .ds-terminal-body p { margin: 4px 0; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.6 0.015 20); }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Newsletter / CTA text input. Matches button height for inline layout.
components.css: .ds-input-email { background: oklch(0.1 0.01 20); color: oklch(0.98 0.002 20); height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; } .ds-input-email::placeholder { color: oklch(0.6 0.015 20); } .ds-input-email:focus { border-color: oklch(0.6 0.2 25); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.6 0.2 25 / 0.3); }

components.name: Nav Dot
components.description: Fixed right-side section navigation dot. Active state uses accent + ring.
components.html: <nav class="ds-nav-dots" aria-label="Section navigation"><button class="ds-nav-dot ds-nav-dot--inactive" aria-label="Go to Hero"></button><button class="ds-nav-dot ds-nav-dot--inactive" aria-label="Go to Features"></button><button class="ds-nav-dot ds-nav-dot--active" aria-label="Go to How it works"></button><button class="ds-nav-dot ds-nav-dot--inactive" aria-label="Go to Get started"></button><button class="ds-nav-dot ds-nav-dot--inactive" aria-label="Go to Footer"></button></nav>
components.css: .ds-nav-dots { position: fixed; right: 20px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); z-index: 50; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid oklch(0.18 0.01 20); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-dot--active { background: oklch(0.6 0.2 25); border-color: oklch(0.6 0.2 25); width: 12px; height: 12px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.6 0.2 25 / 0.3); } .ds-nav-dot--inactive { background: transparent; } .ds-nav-dot--inactive:hover { border-color: oklch(0.98 0.002 20 / 0.5); }

narrative.overview: Regtrace's visual language treats every pixel through the same lens of precision that the tool applies to LLM outputs. The page is a command-line interface made tangible: dark backdrop, monospaced annotations, stark red signal markers, and terminal mockups that demonstrate the tool instead of describing it. Nothing is decorative.
keyCharacteristics: CLI-native aesthetic with terminal mockups and code blocks
Restrained color: one accent (Stoplight Red) on near-black neutral surfaces
Single font family (Geist) with weight contrast
Blur-enhance motion: content starts readable and resolves into clarity

rules.name: The Stoplight Rule
rules.body: Red is a signal, not a decoration. Never use the accent for decorative purposes (gradient text, glassmorphism, background fills). Red means pass/fail, alert, measurement threshold.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are inherently flat. Layering is communicated by lightness, not by shadow. No box-shadow on cards, panels, or containers.

dos: Do use the terminal mockup pattern to demonstrate real regtrace output.
Do apply the Stoplight Rule: red means status, never decoration.
Do use tonal layering for depth.
Do show failing test cases and suite scores in mockups.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left / border-right > 1px as colored accent).
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism.
Don't use the red accent for decorative purposes.
Don't use numbered section markers except for real sequences.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use box-shadow on cards, panels, or containers.
